encounters.chief_complaint: Worsening dyspnea, increased sputum production, wheezing

orders.display_name: bronchodilator: Salbutamol 2.5mg nebulizer q4h (q1h PRN acute)
steroid: Prednisolone 40mg PO daily x5 days
O2: Controlled O2 target SpO2 88-92% (avoid hyperoxia in CO2 retainers)
antipyretic: Acetaminophen 500mg PO q6h PRN temp >= 38.5

orders.clinical_intent: Home medication (continue): J44 - Salbutamol 100mcg inhaler PRN
